revision.text:
{{ #if: {{{float|}}} |
[[Image:{{{float}}}|{{if empty|{{{float_width|{{{width|}}}}}}|0px}}{{#ifeq:{{{float_link|}}}|file:||{{!}}link={{{float_link|}}}}}|alt={{{float_alt|}}}|class={{{float_class|}}}|{{{float_caption|}}}]]
}}[[Image:{{{base|blank.png}}}|{{if empty|{{{base_width|{{{width|}}}}}}|0px}}{{#ifeq:{{{base_link|file:}}}|file:||{{!}}link={{{base_link|file:}}}}}|alt={{{base_alt|}}}|class={{{base_class|}}}|{{{base_caption|}}}]]
{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown=[[Category:Pages using superimpose with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]|preview=Page using [[Template:Superimpose]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| align | base | base_alt | base_caption | base_link | base_width | float | float_alt | float_caption | float_link | float_width | width | x | y }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
